description_long: A loosely scattered pile of French fries is displayed, each fry appearing as a slender, elongated stick with a slightly irregular, hand-cut appearance. The fries have a pale golden-yellow color with subtle variations in hue, suggesting a lightly cooked or baked texture. Their surfaces are matte and show gentle undulations, with some fries overlapping and others lying parallel or at slight angles to each other. The ends of the fries are blunt and squared off, with no visible browning or crisp edges. There is no visible packaging, branding, or condiments present in the scene. The fries rest directly on a neutral, flat surface, emphasizing their natural, unadorned presentation.
description: A loosely scattered pile of pale golden French fries with a matte, hand-cut appearance and no visible packaging or condiments.
description_view_0: This view shows the fries from a slightly elevated angle, highlighting their irregular arrangement and the blunt ends of several fries.
description_view_1: From this angle, the fries appear more densely clustered, with overlapping pieces and a clear view of their length and thickness.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the parallel alignment of many fries and reveals subtle surface texture variations.
description_view_3: The fries are seen from a lower angle, showing more of their sides and the scattered, loosely piled arrangement.
attribute_arrangement_of_fries: The fries are loosely piled and scattered in a casual, unorganized manner on a flat surface.
